content.text: We are reviewing a long pediatric portal thread with many administrative actions available. Please remember that no real patient data is included.
Understood. I will keep the response concise and avoid calling administrative tools unless explicitly asked.
The tool catalog contains email, UUID, and ISO date fields because the production issue involved zod/v4 string-format schemas.
Understood. Those schemas can be present without requiring a tool call for a simple readiness check.
Reply exactly READY. Do not call any tool. Do not add punctuation or explanation.

tools.name: createPatient
tools.description: Synthetic issue #16021 tool 1. The schema intentionally uses zod/v4 string-format validators that emit JSON Schema pattern and format keywords. Do not call this tool unless explicitly asked.

notes.description: Short non-sensitive routing note for a pediatric admin workflow 1
